#### Recent Launches
New![verticalstudio](https://www.zoho.com/sites/zweb/images/productlogos/verticalstudio.svg)
Build secure, scalable, and multi-tenant apps for any industry.
[Try now](https://www.zoho.com/verticalstudio/?src=allproducts)
New![erp](https://www.zoho.com/sites/zweb/images/productlogos/erp.svg)
ERP software built for businesses to run faster and smarter operations.
[Try now](https://www.zoho.com/en-in/erp/?src=allproducts)
New![procurement](https://www.zoho.com/sites/zweb/images/productlogos/procurement.svg)
Complete source-to-pay platform to transform your procurement into a growth engine.
[Try now](https://www.zoho.com/procurement/?src=allproducts)
New![Zoho spend](https://www.zoho.com/sites/zweb/images/productlogos/spend.svg)
Manage and control every business spend from a single unified platform.
[Try now](https://www.zoho.com/spend/?src=allproducts)
New![Zoho mcp](https://www.zoho.com/sites/zweb/images/productlogos/mcp.svg)
Make apps agent-ready, build agentic workflows, and get work done with prompts.
[Try now](https://www.zoho.com/mcp/?src=allproducts)
New![pos](https://www.zoho.com/sites/zweb/images/productlogos/pos.svg)
Modern retail POS to sell better, manage your entire business, and join the digital revolution.
[Try now](https://www.zoho.com/en-in/pos/?src=allproducts)
New![Zoho domains](https://www.zoho.com/sites/zweb/images/productlogos/domains.svg)
Easy domain registration, transfer, and secured DNS management.
[Try now](https://www.zoho.com/domains/?src=allproducts)
New![Zoho dap](https://www.zoho.com/sites/zweb/images/productlogos/dap.svg)
Platform to simplify software adoption with in-product guidance.
[Try now](https://www.zoho.com/dap/?src=allproducts)
SuitesNew![Zoho creatorplus](https://www.zoho.com/sites/zweb/images/productlogos/creatorplus.svg)
Unified platform for the entire app development lifecycle.
[Try now](https://www.zoho.com/creatorplus/?src=allproducts)
SuitesNew![Zoho projectsplus](https://www.zoho.com/sites/zweb/images/productlogos/projectsplus.svg)
Unified project management platform for intelligent, data-driven work.
[Try now](https://www.zoho.com/projectsplus/?src=allproducts)

# We’re more than just a workplace. We’re a family.
We know that finding a meaningful and rewarding career can be a long journey. Our goal is to make that process easy for you and to create a work environment that's enriching—one that you'll look forward to every day.
[View Open Roles](javascript:void\(0\))

I’m New Here
## Find your way around Zoho with Concierge
Not sure which Zoho product is the right fit for your company? No worries. We'll work with you to determine what solutions will best suit your business.
[Get in touch](https://www.zoho.com/concierge/)

articles.title: ManageEngine Rolls Out Autonomous AI Capabilities Across Its Suite to Power Digital Enterprises
articles.description: The Company’s Commitment to Data Privacy and Sovereignty Helps Customers Adopt AI Agents With Confidence AUSTIN, Texas — ManageEngine, a division of Zoho Corporation and a leading provider of enterprise IT management solutions, today announced the rollout of Zia Agents, the company’s proprietary AI-powered autonomous agent, across its digital enterprise management suite. Built within a […]

articles.title: Survey Finds U.S. Workforce Faces Highest AI Security Belief-to-Deployment Gap Globally Despite Leading in Investment Intent
articles.description: New global research presented by Zoho and conducted by Tigon Advisory Corp. finds that spend doesn’t translate into outcomes, as the U.S. faces attack rates and identity visibility gaps above the global average AUSTIN, Texas — Zoho Corporation, a global technology company, today released the State of Workforce Password Security 2026, a global research study...The post Survey Finds U.S. Workforce Faces Highest AI Security Belief-to-Deployment Gap Globally Despite Leading in Investment Intent appeared first on Montreal Gazette.

articles.title: Is Zoho Down now? Zoho Status Update May 4 2026: Services Operating Normally After Recent Minor Disruptions
articles.description: NEW YORK — Zoho, the popular cloud-based business software suite, is currently operating normally across its major services as of Monday, May 4, 2026, with no widespread outages reported on official status pages or major monitoring platforms. While some users experienced intermittent issues with specific components like Zoho PhoneBridge and CRM tools in late April, the company's global infrastructure has stabilized, allowing millions of small and medium-sized businesses to continue relying on its integrated applications for CRM, email, project management and more.

articles.title: Kenya Leads African AI Adoption as Country Prepares to Host Major Global Technology Conference
articles.description: Kenya has recorded the highest AI adoption rate among surveyed African markets, with more than 35% of Kenyan organizations already achieving advanced or widespread AI implementation, according to a new report by Zoho conducted by Arion Research. The report, titled “The AI Privacy Equation: Youthful Innovation Meets Privacy Leadership in Kenya,” found that businesses are [...]

website_summary.company_summary: Zoho Corporation is a software development company that offers a comprehensive suite of online productivity tools and SaaS applications for businesses. Zoho provides solutions across various categories including CRM, finance, collaboration, HR, customer support, e-commerce, AI, and developer tools, serving businesses of all sizes globally.

leadership_or_contact_signals.details: Global sales contact emails and phone numbers for different regions (India, North America, Asia-Pacific, Middle East, Africa, Europe).
Emails for upgrades, renewals, cancellations, and general inquiries (e.g., upgrade@zohocorp.com, renewal@zohocorp.com).
Personalized assistance for product selection and demos.
Job openings and candidate portal for career opportunities.
Opportunities to work with or become a Zoho Partner.

locations.details: Zoho serves customers worldwide with localized websites in multiple languages (e.g., English, Español, Deutsch, Français, 日本語, 中文, etc.).
Global offices mentioned in contact section (e.g., India, USA, Canada, Mexico, Australia, Japan, China, Singapore, UAE, Germany, France, etc.).

business_priorities: Providing comprehensive SaaS solutions for businesses of all sizes
Offering integrated business suites (e.g., Zoho One) for unified operations
Enhancing customer support and service management
Driving digital transformation with AI and automation (e.g., Zia, MCP)
Expanding e-commerce and retail solutions (e.g., POS, Commerce)
Supporting developer and integration needs with platforms like VerticalStudio and Developer Center
Fostering partnerships and collaborations for business growth
technology_signals: AI and machine learning (Zia, Zia Agent Studio, MCP)

source_evidence.claim: Zoho offers a comprehensive suite of CRM and sales tools including Zoho CRM, Bigin, SalesIQ, and Marketing Automation.
Zoho provides customer support solutions such as Zoho Desk, Assist, and FSM (Field Service Management).
Zoho’s finance and accounting products include Books, Expense, Payroll, Inventory, and ERP.
Collaboration and productivity tools offered by Zoho include Mail, WorkDrive, Connect, and Cliq.
Zoho One and Zoho for Enterprise are business suites providing integrated solutions for enterprises.
Zoho provides AI and automation tools like Zia and Zia Agent Studio.
Zoho offers developer and integration tools including Developer Center, VerticalStudio, and integrations with Google Workspace and Microsoft 365.
Zoho has global sales and support contacts for regions including India, North America, Asia-Pacific, Middle East, Africa, and Europe.
Zoho provides career opportunities and a candidate portal for job seekers.
Zoho serves customers worldwide with localized websites in multiple languages.

market_news.headline: Zoho Insists on Bridging Africa’s Divide with Intelligent Infrastructure
market_news.summary: Zoho highlights Africa's software development capacity and technical talent constraints as key challenges for digital infrastructure growth.

market_news.headline: ManageEngine Rolls Out Autonomous AI Capabilities Across Its Suite to Power Digital Enterprises
market_news.summary: ManageEngine introduces Zia Agents, proprietary AI-powered autonomous agents, across its enterprise IT management suite with a focus on data privacy and sovereignty.

market_news.headline: Kenya Leads African AI Adoption as Country Prepares to Host Major Global Technology Conference
market_news.summary: Kenya achieves the highest AI adoption rate in Africa, with over 35% of organizations implementing AI at advanced or widespread levels.

business_priorities.priority: Expanding intelligent infrastructure in emerging markets, particularly Africa
business_priorities.context: Addressing software development capacity and technical talent gaps to support digital growth.
Deployment of autonomous AI agents (e.g., Zia Agents) to enhance IT management and operational efficiency.

business_priorities.priority: Data privacy and sovereignty in AI adoption
business_priorities.context: Ensuring customer confidence in AI tools through privacy-centric frameworks.

pain_points.context: Limited software development capacity hindering digital infrastructure growth.

pain_points.issue: AI security and deployment gaps in the U.S. workforce
pain_points.context: High investment in AI security does not translate into effective deployment, increasing vulnerability to attacks.

pain_points.issue: Service disruptions in cloud-based business software
pain_points.context: Intermittent outages in tools like Zoho PhoneBridge and CRM, impacting SME operations.

technology_signals.signal: Autonomous AI agents for enterprise IT management
technology_signals.context: ManageEngine’s Zia Agents rollout signifies a shift toward AI-driven automation in digital enterprises.

technology_signals.signal: Advanced AI adoption in Africa, led by Kenya
technology_signals.context: Over 35% of Kenyan organizations have achieved advanced AI implementation, setting a regional benchmark.
Zoho’s emphasis on data sovereignty aligns with global regulatory trends and customer trust demands.

market_signals.signal: Growing demand for AI-driven business tools in emerging markets
market_signals.context: Zoho’s focus on Africa reflects strategic expansion into high-growth regions with infrastructure challenges.

market_signals.signal: Disparity between AI security investment and deployment outcomes
market_signals.context: U.S. workforce lags in translating AI security spending into effective protection, highlighting implementation gaps.

market_signals.signal: Resilience of cloud-based business suites post-disruption
market_signals.context: Zoho’s rapid recovery from minor outages underscores the reliability of integrated SaaS platforms for SMEs.

source_evidence.claim: Africa faces constraints in software development capacity and technical talent, impacting digital infrastructure growth.

U.S. workforce faces the highest AI security belief-to-deployment gap globally, despite leading in investment intent.
